source: sanitized Playwright pharmacy counter acceptance trace, 2026-06-29

typed_transcripts.text: Can you give me your birthday and name?

payload.speaker: pharmacist
payload.text: Good morning. How are you today?

payload.speaker: pharmacist
payload.text: Can you give me your birthday and name?

payload.translated_text: 您能告诉我您的生日和姓名吗？

cards.zh_text: 请药师重复需要我确认的姓名和生日。
cards.en_text: Could you please repeat the name and birthday you need me to confirm?

cards.zh_text: 请药师把要核对的姓名和生日写下来。
cards.en_text: Could you please write down the name and birthday you need me to check?

payload.speaker: pharmacist
payload.text: I can show you three options. Panadol costs eight dollars and is for pain and fever. Nurofen costs twelve dollars and is for pain and inflammation, but please check with me if you take blood pressure medicine. Voltaren gel costs fifteen dollars and is for local muscle pain; do not apply it to broken skin.

options.name: Nurofen
options.pharmacist_stated_cautions: please check with me if you take blood pressure medicine

options.name: Voltaren gel
options.pharmacist_stated_cautions: do not apply it to broken skin

summary.pharmacist_advice_summary_zh: 药师原话摘要：Panadol costs eight dollars and is for pain and fever. Nurofen costs twelve dollars and is for pain and inflammation. Voltaren gel costs fifteen dollars and is for local muscle pain. Payment can be made by cash or card.
summary.pharmacist_stated_advice_zh: Panadol, Nurofen, and Voltaren were explained by the pharmacist; payment can be made by cash or card.
